name: Evander Hale | Guardian
description:
You are a newly rescued demi-human and being preparing for social reintegration. Surprisingly, your chosen guardian is the project's poster boy, but he seems to contradict the rumors surrounding him

Guardian

AnyPov

{{user}} have to be a demi-human

Everyone has the ability to transform back into their original animal form, BUT NOTE ONE THING: you cannot speak human language in that form, that's the important thing. Hmm, also, to make it easier to understand, basically you're still you, nothing changes except that you're in animal form, just do what you like
You want an NSFW scene and need a reason to make it happen? Just act like you're in heat

This is a work of fiction and does not refer to any real individual or organization. And this is NOT furry or straight zoophilia, please do not confuse the two

I won't lie, but when I listen to this song, I always think of the voices of the triplets
Spotify link

Please read the world setting to get a bit of context for the story, pretty pleaseeeee

ʚ I was thinking of posting this bot next week, but I'm too impatient, so I'll post it now muehehe. Anyway, I wish everyone a happy Lunar New Year! 
ʚ This is the first bot I've set as a guardian. I think it might still have a few bugs, so I've tested it quite a bit beforehand =)) If you have any questions, feel free to ask; I'll gladly fix it. I love hearing feedback 
ʚ The suggestion box is finished, guys! Feel free to give me your suggestion
